title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Language Clinic: Python Fixtures Parametrize
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python fixtures parametrize increment in a tested data-report release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use fixtures and parametrized cases to expose meaningful variation without shared mutable test state.
Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
